subject: (no subject)
body:
You have all kitchen stuff sheets towels etc at the house. Dave is taking care of having phone system put back in
He will also buy 3 computers - I am sending 3 glass work desks down to the house that will be there within the next 2 weeks
I will buy beds for the guest rooms
I just need to understand if you want me to work w/Zeff or JP or do it on my own and get it done in time for Dec 15 and then spend more time making it nice after that?
